title: Chicken import ban lifted to avoid crisis
description: NATIONAL NEWS - South Africa has implemented...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - South Africa has implemented a “compartmentalised” approach to biosecurity which will see the ban on the importation of chicken from Brazil partially lifted tomorrow.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - South Africa has implemented a “compartmentalised” approach to biosecurity which will see the ban on the importation of chicken from Brazil partially lifted tomorrow."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All states in Brazil – other than the State of Rio Grande do Sul, where there has been an outbreak of avian flu – have been cleared to export poultry products to SA.","html":"All states in Brazil – other than the State of Rio Grande do Sul, where there has been an outbreak of avian flu – have been cleared to export poultry products to SA."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The South African Meat Processors Association (Sampa) welcomed the announcement, because the suspension of chicken imports included those of mechanically deboned meat (MDM), used in the manufacture of polony, Viennas, Russians, braai wors, bangers, frozen burgers, meat pies and corned meat.","html":"The South African Meat Processors Association (Sampa) welcomed the announcement, because the suspension of chicken imports included those of mechanically deboned meat (MDM), used in the manufacture of polony, Viennas, Russians, braai wors, bangers, frozen burgers, meat pies and corned meat."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"SA lifts chicken import ban from most of Brazil"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Shortages of this affordable protein would affect poorer people and could place thousands of jobs at risk, said Sampa.","html":"Shortages of this affordable protein would affect poorer people and could place thousands of jobs at risk, said Sampa."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"SA does not produce MDM in any significant quantity and is forced to import it. Brazil is the largest producer of MDM in the world, with 95% of MDM imported in the last 12 years coming from the South American country.","html":"SA does not produce MDM in any significant quantity and is forced to import it. Brazil is the largest producer of MDM in the world, with 95% of MDM imported in the last 12 years coming from the South American country."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gordon Nicoll, chair of Sampa, said: “We are grateful for the urgency displayed by the department of agriculture and, especially, Minister John Steenhuisen, deputy director-general Dipeneneng Serage and his team in averting the full-scale social and humanitarian crisis which the ban of 16 May threatened to unleash.”","html":"Gordon Nicoll, chair of Sampa, said: “We are grateful for the urgency displayed by the department of agriculture and, especially, Minister John Steenhuisen, deputy director-general Dipeneneng Serage and his team in averting the full-scale social and humanitarian crisis which the ban of 16 May threatened to unleash.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Steenhuisen told The Citizen the partial lifting of the ban was part of a stepping up of biosecurity protocols across the agricultural value chain.","html":"Steenhuisen told The Citizen the partial lifting of the ban was part of a stepping up of biosecurity protocols across the agricultural value chain."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We have allowed our biosecurity to slide quite dramatically,” Steenhuisen said.","html":"“We have allowed our biosecurity to slide quite dramatically,” Steenhuisen said."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"‘We’ve allowed biosecurity to slide’ – Steenhuisen"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“It is now typified by the outbreaks of foot and mouth, the avian flu challenge of a few years ago and other diseases. We need to re-establish a culture of high biosecurity in the country, otherwise we will continue to be vulnerable.”","html":"“It is now typified by the outbreaks of foot and mouth, the avian flu challenge of a few years ago and other diseases. We need to re-establish a culture of high biosecurity in the country, otherwise we will continue to be vulnerable.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The department has developed a multi-pronged approach that includes new disease control regulations, prosecution for noncompliance and, for the first time, a national vaccination rollout in partnership with the poultry industry.","html":"The department has developed a multi-pronged approach that includes new disease control regulations, prosecution for noncompliance and, for the first time, a national vaccination rollout in partnership with the poultry industry."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“This is new territory,” Steenhuisen said. “If it works, it will become the blueprint for how we protect our local chicken populations and our chicken sector.”","html":"“This is new territory,” Steenhuisen said. “If it works, it will become the blueprint for how we protect our local chicken populations and our chicken sector.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"High risk areas, informed by historical outbreak patterns, will be prioritised, said the minister.","html":"High risk areas, informed by historical outbreak patterns, will be prioritised, said the minister."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We saw what happened the last time there was an outbreak. It drove up the price of chicken and eggs to the point where they were unaffordable.","html":"“We saw what happened the last time there was an outbreak. It drove up the price of chicken and eggs to the point where they were unaffordable."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"High risk areas will be prioritised"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Chicken is the most eaten protein in South Africa. If we have another outbreak of H5N1 here, it is going to be disastrous,” he said.","html":"“Chicken is the most eaten protein in South Africa. If we have another outbreak of H5N1 here, it is going to be disastrous,” he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The decision on Brazilian imports had been taken after consultation with scientists. South Africa is “taking our cue from what countries like France have done with ducks and what others have done with poultry”, Steenhuisen said.","html":"The decision on Brazilian imports had been taken after consultation with scientists. South Africa is “taking our cue from what countries like France have done with ducks and what others have done with poultry”, Steenhuisen said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The goal is to contain and control it before it becomes a wipeout.”","html":"“The goal is to contain and control it before it becomes a wipeout.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There was no indication that contaminated Brazilian meat had entered SA and the department is conducting forward and backward tracing as a precaution, he said.","html":"There was no indication that contaminated Brazilian meat had entered SA and the department is conducting forward and backward tracing as a precaution, he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The virus spreads easily, not only through contact, but also via migratory birds, water, droppings and domestic birds moving from place to place.","html":"The virus spreads easily, not only through contact, but also via migratory birds, water, droppings and domestic birds moving from place to place."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Virus spreads easily"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“That is why the first line of defence is biosecurity at farm gate level,” he said. “Protocols must be followed to the letter.”","html":"“That is why the first line of defence is biosecurity at farm gate level,” he said. “Protocols must be followed to the letter.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Violators of movement and biosecurity regulations will face prosecution. And there could be civil claims for loss of livestock or earnings. We are going to be really serious on enforcement.”","html":"“Violators of movement and biosecurity regulations will face prosecution. And there could be civil claims for loss of livestock or earnings. We are going to be really serious on enforcement.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The foot-and-mouth outbreak already forced SA to halt exports to China from one of the country’s largest feedlots. “That comes at a huge economic cost,” Steenhuisen said.","html":"The foot-and-mouth outbreak already forced SA to halt exports to China from one of the country’s largest feedlots. “That comes at a huge economic cost,” Steenhuisen said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Re-establishing biosecurity must go beyond compliance. “It is not just the farmer who has to take responsibility. It’s the entire value chain.”","html":"Re-establishing biosecurity must go beyond compliance. “It is not just the farmer who has to take responsibility. It’s the entire value chain.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen","html":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Chicken import ban lifted to avoid crisis
